description: Creative writing assistant — outline, characters, world, chat (AuthorKit API).
config.title: AuthorKit
config.apiBaseUrl: Base URL of the AuthorKit API (no trailing slash). Ignored when **Start local API** is enabled — the extension then uses 127.0.0.1 and **Local API port**.
config.worldCategoryName: Compendium category name used for the World tree.
config.charactersCategoryName: Compendium category name used for the Characters tree.
config.activeLlmProfile: LLM profile name (key under llm_configs on the API). Sent as workshop `provider` for @authorKit. Empty = use the API default active profile.
config.workshopModelOverride: Optional model id for @authorKit chat. Empty = use the profile's model from API settings.
config.selectionCodeLens: Show a clickable CodeLens on the first line of a text selection to add it to the Workshop (similar to inline “add to chat”).
config.startLocalApi: Download (if needed) and run the standalone AuthorKit API from a GitHub Release, instead of connecting to **API base URL**.
config.localApiPort: TCP port for the locally managed API (127.0.0.1).
config.localApiBinaryPath: Optional absolute path to a standalone `author-kit-api` executable (skips download). For local PyInstaller builds.
config.githubApiReleaseTag: Optional GitHub release tag for the API bundle (e.g. v0.1.0). Empty = use **bundledApiVersion** from the extension package.
chat.participant.description: Optional: use @authorKit in VS Code Chat for the workshop API. Prefer the AuthorKit **Workshop** panel (toolbar) for the same API without @mentions.
